title: Almost Perfect Minecraft
description: A modpack for Minecraft, which combines adventure, bosses, vanilla gameplay all together and expands the fun of the game.
body: ### V1.5.6 Update IN PROGRESS = ▰▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱▱ 3% _Thursday, 3 August 2023_\ **Note:**\ Still waiting for PlayerEx to be updated, been waiting for ages for this author to update, he said he will update the mod in August # About APMC, **Almost Perfect Minecraft**, is a modpack that improves game mechanic, expands content of vanilla Minecraft, adds RPG styled elements like bosses and dungeons ***while keeping the vanilla gameplay without being less important during the gameplay process***. =========================================================================== ## What's the difference between APMC and other RPG modpacks? Most other modpacks focus on a one-sided theme such as RPG or Adventure, makes player give up on some vanilla Minecraft gameplay process due to early game being too easy or just completely ignores it. This modpack contains mods not only will make it so you can have your time enjoy building, mining, upgrade your gears, and also having lots of challenges later in the game so it aims to wanting you to get more and more powerful, there's never enough, the limit does not exist. ## Is it fun? #### 🔮 270+ Mods After carefully picking every new 1.20.1 updated excellent mods made by the communtiy and solving mod conflicts, there're lots of new fun contents added in the game, including new cute animals, new biomes, better dimensions, new armors and weapons, and artifacts, etc. ## How to install the modpack? You can follow Modrinth's official document here: Modrinth's instructions on [playing modpacks](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/) with [ATLauncher](https://atlauncher.com/about), [MultiMC](https://multimc.org/), and [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/) ## Credits ### Mods | [ **Structory**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory) \ | [ **Nature Compass**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/natures-compass) \ | [ **When Dungeons Arise - Fabric!**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/when-dungeons-arise-fabric) | 简体中文资源包（Minecraft Mod Language Package） >##### [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/i18nupdatemod) | [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/i18nupdatemod) | [Github](https://github.com/CFPAOrg/Minecraft-Mod-Language-Package) | [Official Website](http://cfpa.team/) ### Mods Added in v1.5.5 | [ **Windchimes**](https://modrinth.com/mod/windchimes) \ | [ **Sooty Chimneys for Fabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sooty-chimneys-fabric) \ | [ **Cherished Worlds**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds) \ | [ **Trash Cans**](https://modrinth.com/mod/trash-cans) \ | [ **Vectorientation**](https://modrinth.com/mod/vectorientation) \ | [ **Telepistons**](https://modrinth.com/mod/telepistons) \ | [ **NoSilkTouchNoBreaking**](https://modrinth.com/mod/nosilktouchnobreaking) \ | [ **FabricNetherOres**](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricnetherores) \ | [ **Monsters in the Closet**](https://modrinth.com/mod/monsters-in-the-closet) \ | [ **Mica**](https://modrinth.com/mod/mica) \ | [ **Interactic**](https://modrinth.com/mod/interactic) \ | [ **Item Highlighter**](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-highlighter) \ | [ **HerdsPanic**](https://modrinth.com/mod/herdspanic) \ | [ **Guard Villagers (Fabric/Quilt)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/guard-villagers-(fabricquilt)) \ | [ **Golem: Firsts of Legend**](https://modrinth.com/mod/golem-first-of-stone) \ | [ **Cave Dweller Fabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dweller-fabric) \ | [ **AutoReconnect**](https://modrinth.com/mod/autoreconnect) ## Why do you make this modpack? When playing SMP with my other friends, they always say: 'The game gets boring after building all mob farms, trading halls and having our own houses, there's nothing more and game is so easy cuz we've got every best enchantments on equipments." After 1.20.1 update, I started doing my own modpack, with the prior experience playing Medieval MC and Better MC, I believe the game can be way more fun with balanced and fun new contents added into it.
